keyword: quietest pet water fountain for bedroom
title: Quietest Pet Water Fountain for the Bedroom (Sleep-Friendly)
meta: Near-silent pet fountains that won't keep you awake at night.
intro: A fountain in the bedroom only works if the pump is whisper-quiet. We prioritized measured low-dB pumps and anti-vibration design.

sections.body: Cheap pumps hum; look for 'ultra-quiet' pumps rated under 30dB at low speed.
A low tank makes pumps gurgle. Keep it topped and use a wide reservoir.
A foam pad under the fountain kills vibration buzz on hard floors.

faq.q: Why does it get loud over time?
faq.a: Debris on the impeller; clean monthly.
